item.title: Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds ‘Angry Birds Content Drop’ update now available
item.content:encoded:
SEGA has released the “Angry Birds Content Drop” update for Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds, the company announced.

The update will include the following content:

  • Red from Angry Birds as a playable character
  • Red’s vehicle, the Super Roaster
  • Special emotes and sounds, including three new songs added to the Jukebox:
    • “Go! Theme”
    • “Go! Theme (Final Lap)”
    • “Angry Birds Theme”

An in-game “Angry Birds Festival” will also run from April 16 at 5:00 p.m. PT / 8:00 p.m. ET until April 19 at 4:59 pm. PT / 7:59 p.m. ET.

Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, PlayStation 4, Xbox One, Switch, and PC via Steam and Epic Games Store.

Watch a new trailer and gameplay video below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

Angry Birds Red Introduction Trailer

English

Japanese

Red Gameplay

Screenshots

  • ❮
  • ❯


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/sonic-racing-crossworlds-angry-birds-content-drop-update-now-available
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Co-op survival horror game Dark Hours coming to PS5, Xbox Series on April 22
item.content:encoded:
• PS5
  • Xbox Series

Currently available for PC.

Piece of Cake Studios will release cooperative survival horror game Dark Hours for PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series on April 22 for $14.99, the developer announced.

Dark Hours first launched in Early Access for PC via Steam on October 24, 2024, followed by a full release on October 23, 2025. It has sold over 500,000 units.

The content and features available in the console release include:

  • Eight monsters with their exclusive abilities and weaknesses
  • Over 50 heist items: heist kits, various hacking and remote-control devices, EMP Holy and Ice grenades, flare gun, entities scanners and GPS trackers, instant cameras, and more
  • 60 maps across five environments: Auction Houses, Casinos, Museums, Nuclear Power Plants, and Cruise ships
  • Over 12 mission objectives to plan your heists around
  • Three mafia factions to build your reputation across and unlock exclusive items and customizations
  • Four difficulty levels, including the Nightmare mode.
  • Over 100 customization items
  • Various deadly puzzles, traps, and minigames
  • Player-versus-player-versus-environment mode where two teams of robbers compete against each other
  • Three fun extra game modes: Golden Rabbit, Curling, and Red Light Green Light
  • Cross-play and friends online system

Here is an overview of the game, via Piece of Cake Studios:

About

Dark Hours is a cooperative survival horror game for up to four players.

You and your crew were ready for the perfect heist, until something went terribly wrong. Right after breaking in, the power cuts out and you realize something isn’t right. You’re trapped inside the building you came to rob… and you’re not alone. A monster has taken over the place and you’re its next prey. Will you manage to escape? Will you survive this apocalyptic night?

Key Features

  • Plan. Break. Steal.
    • Explore five environments: an auction house, a museum, a casino, a power plant and a cruise ship
    • Use over 50 heist items: hacking tools, EMPs, scanners, cameras, teleporters, tasers and more.
    • Complete over 12 mission objectives: steal precious artifacts, destroy evidence, blow up the building, escape with the jackpot and more.
    • Steal valuable loot, complete your contracts, and score big!
  • Cooperate. Survive. Escape.
    • Eight unique monsters, each with their own abilities, strengths and weaknesses.
    • Dynamic cooperative gameplay: solve puzzles and minigames, deactivate lasers and security cameras, share (or steal) the loot.
    • Be stealthy and aware of your surroundings: every bad step can attract the monsters.
    • Survive together… or use your friends to get out alive.
  • Play. Earn. Repeat.
    • Three mafia factions to build your reputation and unlock rare, useful, and fun gear among 50+ items.
    • Over 100 customization items to define your own style.
    • Four difficulty levels, including a Nightmare Mode.

Watch a new trailer below.

Consoles Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/co-op-survival-horror-game-dark-hours-coming-to-ps5-xbox-series-on-april-22
